programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Rodney and Mr. J both want to help Andy win the melon-crate derby, but they want it so much that they forget to include him when they build their carts.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: While on a camping trip with the Badger Scouts, Andy makes a fun new enemy--the annoying Kyle Finkster!

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: The other pets in the pet parade can do lots of cool, exciting tricks, which makes Rodney look bad.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: After Rodney is accidentally left behind while the Johnson's are on vacation, he goes to bunk with Leon in the wild.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Rodney and Mr. J become managers of rival baseball teams, but neither will let Andy play.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney have a falling out and hold auditions to find new best friends.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney compete to be the faces of Furlock, a new pet hair gel from international hair icon and fancypants, Manzio.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney are determined to stay up all night in order to see the legendary Yellow Flash in the sky.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Building a pool in the backyard would wreck Leon's tree, which is the last thing Rodney wants.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: An accident strands Rodney on a deserted island. Except it's the kind of 'island' you find in the street.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: The night before he's to give an important speech, Mr. J loses his voice while laughing too hard at a silly singing cow movie that Rodney insisted he watch.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Andy tries to bridge the gap between Rodney and his father through the timeless art of karaoke.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Rodney's attempt to fix the air conditioner goes terribly wrong, leaving him trapped in the walls of the house.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Rodney's special time at the circus with Darlene is ruined by the arrival of Rodney's Cousin Eddie.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Andy is practically blind after losing his glasses, but all his other senses suddenly start working much better.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: When a cereal box provides the location of buried treasure, Andy and Rodney must make peace with their arch-enemies Kyle and Salty Mike to dig it up.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Rodney enlists Leon and Darlene to join The Rod Squad, whose heroic mission is to prevent Andy from getting in trouble with Mrs. J. After donning ridiculous outfits and infiltrating a sticky bun warehouse, things start to get very silly.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Rodney really is the perfect pet... until the arrival of Archie, a rabbit who REALLY is the perfect pet.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Much to his delight, Rodney learns he is an endangered species, whose every whim must be catered to. Much to his chagrin, Mr. J learns Rodney is an endangered species, whose every whim must be catered to.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: It's Andy's birthday, and wouldn't you know it, what with all the lounging and the resting and the napping, Rodney totally forgot!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po’s new life as The Dragon Warrior is threatened by the emergence of a formidable villain determined to conquer China and destroy Kung Fu.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: The chefs head to the mountains, a few hours outside of Los Angeles to go to Summer Camp where they are challenged to an outdoor grilling Quickfire for Padma and “Top Chef” Kentucky winner Kelsey Barnard Clark. Before the sun rises, the chefs get to work on an upscale brunch buffet for 200 moms vacationing at the camp using a very limited stock pantry. It’ll take more than s’mores and a round of kumbayas to impress the moms, the judges Tom, Padma and Gail, and guest judge “Top Chef” Charleston Winner Brooke Williamson.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision. The chefs must make this formidable dinner for not just these Kaiseki masters, but in celebration of the Tokyo games with Olympic medalists Diana Taurasi, Rai Benjamin, Nastia Liukin, Ibtihaj Muhammad, Christian Coleman, Kerri Walsh Jennings and NBC Olympic Primetime Host Mike Tirico. The gold medal meal takes place at the iconic Los Angeles Coliseum with Padma, Tom, Nilou Motamed and Niki & Carole Lidi-Nakayama at the judges table.

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: Superman returns after five years in space to find Lois engaged and Lex Luthor with a sinister plan that will endanger America.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles, and Tails are back for their most epic adventure yet. The team reunite to face a new formidable foe, Shadow.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: A young man discovers the meaning of true love while battling princes, ghosts and an evil witch in a quest to protect the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Ruby And The Well S2
programme.desc: A new wish leads Ruby to reunite a family.

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2
programme.desc: A fan-favorite junior chef makes a triumphant return, just in time for the wildly popular Top Chef Junior Food Truck Battle! The 6 remaining chefs must divide into teams to whip up custom food truck concepts and imaginative menus all their own. But with only 24 hours to deliver the goods for a crowd of hungry diners, things take a left turn when unexpected weather sends the chefs into a spinout. Will they manage to stay on course or will their food truck dreams come to a screeching halt?

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2
programme.desc: A giant, mysterious crate awaits the chefs in the kitchen and things take a hairy turn when they discover some surprising guests will be doing the shopping for them today! Animal expert and conservationist Jeff Corwin stops by to introduce the chefs to some wild animal ambassadors that send the chefs on a global, culinary adventure to cook meals inspired by different regions of the world.

programme.title: Old Guy

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 4
programme.desc: Strange events begin to occur when a woman and her child move into the neighbourhood.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: When a young African-American man visits his white girlfriend’s family estate, he becomes ensnared in the more sinister, real reason for the invitation.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes Of Grindelwald
programme.desc: Grindelwald escapes custody and Albus Dumbledore enlists his former student Newt Scamander, who agrees to help, unaware of the dangers that lie ahead.

programme.desc: Believing power is paramount, Tae-soo aspires to become a prosecutor. As he achieves his goal and rises swiftly to power, he also sees the cruelty of a life at the top hierarchy in 90's Korea.

programme.title: Veteran
programme.desc: A merciless detective hunts down a young and successful drug addict who always escapes from investigations with the help of his wealth and connections.

programme.title: The Snitch
programme.desc: Kang-soo was falsely accused and imprisoned. A prosecutor offered him a deal to be a snitch in exchange for a reduced sentence and Kang-soo starts to shake up the drug investigation...

programme.title: The Glorious My Revenge
programme.desc: Detective Ryu lost his beloved son in a hit-and-run accident. As the statute of limitations passed without finding the criminal, he ran into the murderer of his son.

programme.title: One Win
programme.desc: Woo-jin is the newly appointed manager of a girls' volleyball team which is going to disband. The new owner sold all ace players for money and asked the team to win at least once.

programme.title: Love My Scent
programme.desc: An ordinary man who has never known love, struggles to talk to his crush who goes to work on the same bus as him every day. Things started to change when he acquires a strange perfume that has the power to attract women...

programme.title: Miss Baek
programme.desc: A woman finds it difficult to shake off her ex-convict label, until she meets a girl whom she is determined to save.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers

While Tony is grappling with his identity crisis, Echo struggles to survive spy school, and Ms. Nowhere and Gary disappear in a massive North African storm during their hunt for Cleve. programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: Big Story
programme.desc: Big Story is a documentary film program on CGTN. It explores global events with in a variety of filmic styles and featuring original, in-depth, thought-provoking storytelling.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ""living in the future"!

programme.desc: When Snotlout and Astrid must fly a ceremonial battle axe to a family wedding, they must work together when an Armorwing dragon derails their plan

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: The Uncuddleables have struck the Lil Dumpling baby pageant, replacing all of Baby Corp's super-cute top 5%er babies with not-cute bottom 5%ers. Boss, Tina and their field team race to caravan the 5%ers from their homes to the pageant before Nannycam deploys the nuclear option of unleashing the dangerously cute UBO on stage to salvage a Lil Dumpling win.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss Baby and Tina reject the 5%er system that says the cuter you are, the more love you deserve. Teaming up with the Uncuddleables, the team tries to take down the system from within, forming a resistance of the eight department heads of Baby Corp in the hopes of changing the way we look at Baby Love forever.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team go to the city of Tikal to get more information on the Protector, but it's easier said than done, since nobody in the town actually knows the identity of the Protector. Blade becomes increasingly frustrated and Po attempts to help her.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team play a game of Pok-ta-pok against a family of armadillos for the opportunity to talk one on one with Zuma, the leader. The game brings out a highly competitive and aggressive side to Blade, known as "The Beast." Back in China, Colin and Weimin find the Pirate Queen and become part of her pirate crew.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The Dragon Knights make a deal for the Storm Wheel but first must obtain the other Storm Wheel from a mysterious mad scientist. Though Mastodon continues to warn the team about the dangers in using the Tianshang Weapons, they use them in a fight against Klaus and Veruca. The clash of the weapons wakes a dormant volcano!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Our team battles Rafaela’s mind-controlled crowd. They soon discover that Rafaela’s true plan is to steal the spy plane. Tony deduces that Rafaela isn’t doing all of this for the money - she’s doing it for family.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Cleve Kelso breaks Rafaela Moreno and a dangerous, cybernetic prisoner named Matsuo Mori from a high-security ice prison. Back in LA, Tony and the crew experience a major shake-up when Echo gets accepted to Ms. Nowhere’s spy training but Tony is rejected. While Tony is grappling with his identity crisis, Echo struggles to survive spy school, and Ms. Nowhere and Gary disappear in a massive North African storm during their hunt for Cleve. Echo must lead the Toretto crew and finish Ms. Nowhere’s mission – what could Cleve be up to in the desert?

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The team travels to Nihaya, or “The Dead End,” in their pursuit of Nowhere’s mission. Unfortunately they run into some of Layla’s spurned former criminal partner Sandocal, who steals the kids’ cars for revenge on Layla. With Frostee, Cisco, and Echo held captive, Tony and Layla drive for Sandocal in a dune buggy race to win back their crew’s freedom. The crew manages to steal a few of the dune buggies and take off into the desert! Meanwhile, Rafaela and Matsuo bust into a secret military base and steal an important piece of tech for Cleve.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Bushbaby didn't have big eyes. She had tiny little eyes and she was always getting lost. Strange things begin to happen and there are stories that Majitu the Great Giant has returned to Tinga Tinga. Young Bushbaby doesn't believe a word of it... and convinces the other animals that Majitu the Giant does not exist. "If you can't see him, he's not real". But then she does see the Giant and her eyes grow big as planets. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: When a deadly secret resurfaces, five friends are stalked by a vengeful killer.

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 3)
programme.desc: When “grief influencer” Raquel Drabowski’s presumed-dead husband makes a miraculous return, their reunion takes a fatal plunge. Meanwhile, Elsbeth’s surprise reunion with an old friend could expose a dangerous undercover operation.

programme.title: Sight Unseen (Season 2)
programme.desc: A quick stop for gas turns into a parent's worst nightmare when a 6 year old boy is snatched during a carjacking. Tess and Jake race against the clock to bring the child home alive as Sunny pours all her focus away from her trauma and into the case. When Tess and Jake track down the perp in a tense OJ style pursuit, Tess's empathy defuses a potentially deadly standoff, reuniting the boy safely with his family and prompting her to reflect on her own family history. Meanwhile, Sunny fights back intrusive thoughts with self-defense classes, and Matt seems to be ready to move on from Tess— but who is he dating…?

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 8)
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: Owen and Claire return to the ruins of the Jurassic World theme park to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from a looming volcanic extinction.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (Season 14)

programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: The World This Week - Episode 9
programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work - Chips
programme.desc: Dr Karl crunches into the crispy, salty, science packed world of chips, proving there's more to one of the nation's favourite treats than meets the mouth.

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season - Round 2 - Port Adelaide v Essendon
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: Common Cause - Coral Gardeners - PNG
programme.desc: As rising sea temperatures devastate coral reefs, a community in Papua New Guinea teams up with an Australian organisation - and the feisty village chicken - to restore fish stocks in their coastal waters.

programme.title: The Chef's Garden - Episode 4
programme.desc: Chef Massimo Mele pairs delicious Tongola goat curd with freshly-picked beetroot and vegetables. Then it's into the pure Tassie waters where Massimo samples some of the world's best oysters.

programme.title: On Country Kitchen - Episode 4
programme.desc: It's season 2 and Derek still can't cook! With locally found ingredients, and a sprinkle of culture and character, Mark and Derek create an Indigenous-inspired feast for the people they visit along their journey.

programme.title: ABC National News - Episode 81
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you today's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Meredith Sheehan.

programme.title: Play On - Episode 2
programme.desc: Series 2 takes audiences into the inner sanctum of a Fijian rugby team, a suburban cricket team captained by a former Sri Lankan superstar and up close to the grit and tenacity of the Tiwi Bombers.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work - Chips
programme.desc: Dr Karl crunches into the crispy, salty, science packed world of chips, proving there's more to one of the nation's favourite treats than meets the mouth.

programme.title: ABC Late News Weekend - Episode 24
programme.desc: When you need to know what's happening turn to ABC News for coverage you can trust. Meredith Sheehan brings you the day's news by reporters in more locations across Australia, connecting communities and telling your stories.

programme.title: Offsiders - Women's Asian Cup Final Special
programme.desc: For 20 years, Offsiders has been here to unpack all the action, both on and off the field. Host Abbey Gelmi and the panel review the Women's Asian Cup Final plus all the latest NRL, AFL and Super Rugby news and action.

programme.title: The Chef's Garden - Episode 4
programme.desc: Chef Massimo Mele pairs delicious Tongola goat curd with freshly-picked beetroot and vegetables. Then it's into the pure Tassie waters where Massimo samples some of the world's best oysters.

programme.title: On Country Kitchen - Episode 4
programme.desc: It's season 2 and Derek still can't cook! With locally found ingredients, and a sprinkle of culture and character, Mark and Derek create an Indigenous-inspired feast for the people they visit along their journey.

programme.title: ABC News Overnight - Episode 24
programme.desc: The final word on the day's top stories, with the latest news and updated information from Australia's most trusted source of independent news. Presented by Meredith Sheehan.

programme.title: Play On - Episode 2
programme.desc: Series 2 takes audiences into the inner sanctum of a Fijian rugby team, a suburban cricket team captained by a former Sri Lankan superstar and up close to the grit and tenacity of the Tiwi Bombers.

programme.title: A Brief History Of Cricket Down Und - Evolution
programme.desc: The arrival of pay TV changes cricket. Innovate ideas in player development, the commercialisation of the game and the arrival of a group of once in a generation players level-ups the sport like never before.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 6
programme.desc: Hosted by award-winning journalist Pip Courtney, Landline is Australia's only national agricultural television program covering stories from Australia's rural and regional heartland.

programme.title: Insiders - Episode 9
programme.desc: David Speers and the panel discuss the outcome of the South Australian State Election. How have the Liberals and One Nation performed and what are the federal implications? Plus the week in politics as parliament returns.

programme.title: Offsiders - Women's Asian Cup Final Special
programme.desc: For 20 years, Offsiders has been here to unpack all the action, both on and off the field. Host Abbey Gelmi and the panel review the Women's Asian Cup Final plus all the latest NRL, AFL and Super Rugby news and action.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 58
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. Bridget Brennan and James Glenday present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Emma Rebellato, Catherine Murphy and Nate Byrne.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 58
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. Bridget Brennan and James Glenday present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Emma Rebellato, Catherine Murphy and Nate Byrne.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings - Episode 58
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon - Episode 58
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent - Episode 4
programme.desc: We are your passport to the world. Our stories, told through the ABC's network of foreign correspondents, will take you to incredible places where you'll meet the people and see the forces shaping our world.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: This is the saga of Intergalactic warrior Paul Atreides and his messianic rise to lead his people and their struggle for survival. The young hero leads his warriors against an evil baron and tries to destroy a galaxy-wide trade in 'spice.'

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: The Fast And The Furious
programme.desc: The Fast And The Furious is pure faced paced adrenaline-fuelled car action. A rookie cop goes undercover, posing as a racing team member to investigate a series of hijackings.

programme.title: Liar, Liar
programme.desc: Jim Carrey stars as a fast-talking attorney and habitual liar who, forced by his son's birthday wish, must tell the truth for the next 24 hours.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Po is a dreamer who must embrace his true self in order to become the Dragon Warrior. Filled with high-kicking humor and an all-star cast.

programme.title: Yes Man
programme.desc: Jim Carrey stars with Bradley Cooper, Zooey Deschanel, John Michael Higgins, and Terence Stamp in the story of a man who, with a single word, becomes a most extraordinary Yes Man.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A bounty hunter learns that his next target is his ex-wife.

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: Jim Carrey and Cameron Diaz star in this story of a sweet, socially inept bank teller who discovers a mask that transforms him into a superhero ... but one whom you may not want to call for help.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: The Fast And The Furious
programme.desc: The Fast And The Furious is pure faced paced adrenaline-fuelled car action. A rookie cop goes undercover, posing as a racing team member to investigate a series of hijackings.

programme.desc: Jim Carrey stars as a fast-talking attorney and habitual liar who, forced by his son's birthday wish, must tell the truth for the next 24 hours.

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: Jim Carrey and Cameron Diaz star in this story of a sweet, socially inept bank teller who discovers a mask that transforms him into a superhero ... but one whom you may not want to call for help.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When jewellery seller Minerva Cantu, 26, is found bound, gagged and lifeless in her home, police suspect robbery as the motive.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S2)
programme.desc: A young woman that aspires to be an FBI agent is brought in after trying to run her boyfriend over with her car, while a male exotic dancer finds himself back in jail due to a previous DUI charge.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6)
programme.desc: Lakhvir Singh enjoyed cooking for Lucky Cheema, the man she loved. But when he left her to marry a much younger woman, Singh made the couple a meal that would turn out to be the last Lucky ever tasted.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S16)
programme.desc: After a violent melee leaves two young men brutally gunned down, Mobile detectives have to track down multiple suspects to piece together what happened.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6)
programme.desc: A young father and his family come under attack at a busy drive-thru. Terrified of his aggravated assailant, he fires his gun and allegedly injures an innocent bystander.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: A young man who came to the U.S. to fulfil his dreams is killed at a birthday party, and Tulsa police must cut through a web of lies to find the culprit.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A convicted felon shows the judge his gunshot wounds; a judge can't stop laughing at a defendant's inability to parallel park; a convicted killer must face a judge known as 'Scary Mary'; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A convicted felon drops the f-bomb during a virtual hearing; a grieving mother brings her son's ashes to his killer's sentencing; and more.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: In Mobile, a professor is murdered in his own home. It takes a missing gaming console and a strategic game of cat and mouse with the suspects for detectives and prosecutors to get justice.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson
programme.desc: After Nicole’s murder, OJ's behaviour grows increasingly erratic and bizarre. Placed squarely in the LAPD's crosshairs as the prime suspect, he leads them on a slow-speed chase down the 405.

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S2)
programme.desc: Curtis Reeves stands accused of murdering Chad Oulson over popcorn at a matinee movie. The defence claims he acted in self-defence—that Oulson was the aggressor.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder (S1)
programme.desc: When Toni meets Harold at a medical convention, they click and soon marry. But when money starts going missing from Toni's account, suspicion falls on Harold.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: An undercover NYPD officer and an ATF special agent learn firsthand not to trust a suspect's demeanour, regardless of how amicable it may appear.

programme.title: City Confidential (S8)
programme.desc: People in charming Hope Mills, are on edge when a high school freshman vanishes while on her way to meet a friend. When she turns up dead three weeks later, the community rallies to flush out the killer.

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2)
programme.desc: A man risks his life to save his wife during a home invasion; two convenience store workers defend their workplace; a hairdresser is put in an unpredictable situation; and more.

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2)
programme.desc: A longstanding feud comes to a head when two neighbours confront each other with guns; a school bus driver goes on a dangerous high-speed chase to outrun an irate parent who attacks her bus with a hammer.

programme.title: Women On Death Row
programme.desc: Linda Carty was sentenced to death on February 19, 2001 for the kidnapping of three-day-old newborn Ray Cabrera, and the kidnapping and murder of his mother, Joana Rodriguez.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6)
programme.desc: After a construction company boss is found shot dead, no arrests are made. An employee says he'd been bound and gagged by a gang just before the shooting. But 14 years later police charge him with murder.

programme.title: Witness To Murder: Digital Evidence
programme.desc: After the gruesome murder of an aspiring actor in Georgia, police quickly run out of leads. But a new digital forensic tool breathes new life into the investigation.

programme.title: Grade 4 Math

programme.title: Kurdapya ep 13
programme.desc: Kurdapya tells the story of long-lost twins, KURING & DAPHNE. They meet after a strange accident and discover that they lead extremely different lives. Kuring grew up with the cruel extended family in the province while Daphne is an undervalued publishing executive in the city. Both women want to get out of their current realities, so they decide to switch lives by pretending to be each other.

programme.desc: Vangie, Georgie, Samantha and Diane are best of friends who encounter different journeys in life as they go through college. programme.desc: Kun YiLing and KangLan started off with a fake marriage but fell in love for real. Will they be able to get their happily ever after?

programme.title: The Love Trap - EP 1 穿越谜情
programme.desc: KeMing is investigating a case at a café. While chasing after dessert chef PeiYa to get her statement, both of them accidentally fell into the water and find themselves in a strange place.

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Why Her? - EP 8 为何是吴秀才
programme.desc: Oh Soo-jae is a talented lawyer who gets caught up in an unexpected case. At law school, she meets the student Gong Chan, who falls in love with her and would do anything to protect her.

programme.title: Tempahan Eid
programme.desc: Eid is a seamstress who aims to continue her late grandmother's legacy. She struggles to earn the trust of her grandmother's customers and has a hard time to find new clients as more people are buying online and no longer appreciate traditional hand-sewn details. As Hari Raya approaches, Eid, struggles to finish the orders. In addition, she has to restore her reputation that is ruined by an unhappy customer's viral video.

programme.title: Saat Hilang Tong Gas Mu
programme.desc: Azal works tirelessly, driving trucks during the day and selling bundles online at night after Azrina's parent request a dowry of RM20,000 for their marriage. When his lorry is stolen, he manages to recover it, but discovers that 200 gas cylinders worth RM20,000 are missing. With the wedding just a month away, Azal must find the money or risk losing Azrina.

programme.title: Ubi Superstar Raya
programme.desc: Get ready for a Raya celebration like no other with Ubi Superstar Raya! Packed with hilarious sketches, catchy musical parodies and plenty of festive cheer. This comedy stage special brings together the funniest highlights of Ubi for non-stop laughs.

programme.title: Gotong-Royong S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: In attempting to host a sports day event for the students of MIJ Hub, Muslims with Muscles are having difficulties as they lack experience. With coaches from the Eastern Rebels Rugby Group, will the team be able to carry out their plan successfully?

programme.title: Zaman Sekolah S4 - EP 9
programme.desc: "Zaman Sekolah" is a nostalgic journey back to the cherished days of schooling, where life-long memories and foundations were built. Each episode dives deep into the heart of what school life meant for our celebrity guests who return to their alma maters to relive and share their most poignant and formative experiences.

programme.title: Marhaban Ya Ramadan - EP 3
programme.desc: Mahani gets frustrated when Razak begins to come home late after tarawih prayers because he is enjoying his teh tarik sessions with Umar and Rahim. When Farah and Ratna both approach their rich relative for a donation, tensions arise between them.

programme.title: Marhaban Ya Ramadan - EP 4
programme.desc: Maria and her siblings, Mardiana and Malik get into a major argument which starts after the siblings accuse her of meddling in their affairs and having a holier than thou attitude. Farah confronts Ratna about "hijacking" her rich donor.

programme.title: Upin & Ipin S10 - EP 5
programme.desc: In the 10th season of Upin & Ipin, include the twins and friends playing a game in a futuristic field, learning about a new celebration, and finding strange creatures in the village.

programme.title: Dapur Vaganza - EP 19
programme.desc: Join the stars of Gegar Vaganza as they light up the kitchen, cooking, entertaining and getting ready for Ramadan while sharing laughter and stories with host Kak Lina and Tok Ram.

programme.title: Mimpi Raya
programme.desc: Muaz and Faiz, competitive cousins in their mid-20s, rarely see eye to eye. When their grandmother, Nek Mah, needs help preparing dishes for Hari Raya, both eagerly volunteer - not out of love for cooking, but to impress her stunning neighbor, Aliza. Neither has cooking experience, but they see this as their chance to win her attention. However, Aliza's protective father, Pak Budi, is a formidable obstacle, and their antics only fuel his frustration As they prepare for Raya, the cousins' rivalr

programme.title: Tetamu Ramadan - EP 6
programme.desc: As Salahudin and Rozainah prepares for Hari Raya celebration, Rashid takes the opportunity to attend career fair with Salahudin. Meanwhile Nina continues with her charitable contributions in Ramadan as she tries to forget about Farid. Salahudin finally approves of Farid but Farid tells him that hes already made up his mind to return to London for Hari Raya. What happen when Nina finds out Farid is going back? Will the couple get back together in time for Hari Raya? Tune in to the final episode

programme.title: Travelawak Projek Bapak Bapak Balik Kampung
programme.desc: Join Bapak-Bapak geng as Tok Ram and Jatt Ali introduce Tok Jalal and Roy Azman what is like to Raya in Singapore

programme.title: Hard To Heart S5 - EP 1
programme.desc: A heart-to-heart talk that will uncover stories that have never been shared with the country's celebrities and new host, Awal Ashaari.

programme.title: Spontan Balik raya - EP 1
programme.desc: Spontan Balik Raya will see the return of Spontan contestants from previous seasons. They will visit villages across Malaysia and play Spontan Games with the villagers

programme.title: Terompak Sana Tertukar Sini
programme.desc: When Julia and her bankrrupt husband, Romi, learn about their child's serious health condition, they become desperate to find money for treatment. In a momnet of desperation, they plan a robbery. However, a strange and magical incident causes them to switch body. Romi is suddenly force to deal with the challenges of being a woman, while Julia must navigate life as a man. Will they be able to find a way to return to their original bodies?

programme.title: (Live) Berita

programme.title: Andai Tiada Suri - EP 5
programme.desc: Hisyam Hamid and Zahiril Adzim from the hit drama Andai Tiada Dia swap scripts for spatulas as they step into the kitchen together. Catch the laughter as they fumble and have fun cooking classic Ramadan favourites all under the watchful and witty guidance of Malaysia's iconic TV Moms.

programme.title: Reeza GTR
programme.desc: Reeza, a young man with a big heart and principle in life. He works in a car shop and love fast cars. He is on the verge of achieving his dreams when one day he meets the beautiful Myra hiding in the trunk of his car. Thereafter, his life turns chaotic and is never the same again as he tries to save Myra from an arranged marriage.

programme.title: Air Tangan - EP 2
programme.desc: Content creator Emmireen Norman, who can't cook, gets together with his aunt, Madam Miseriah, an accomplish cook, to create a favourite dish of the family, lemak tumis telur. Tradition then meets modernity as Madam Miseriah uses her skills to make Beef Rendang Tacos.

programme.title: Berita

programme.title: Baba Papa Nak Raya!
programme.desc: Latif, Liana, Lutfi, Izzaty and Rugayah are all busy preparing for Hari Raya. Latif and Rugayah are overseeing the surge in orders for their instant rendang paste business while Liana and Izzaty are busy with the Hari Raya decorations. But everyone's plans start coming undone when Latif's obnoxious brother and humblebrag sister-in-law, Luqman and Sara, who are based in Sydney, decide to come to Singapore to celebrate Hari Raya with the family!

programme.title: Mazaka (Telugu)
